# minio_s3_bucket_tags (Data Source)

Reads tags from an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_tags" "my_bucket" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}

output "environment" {
  value = data.minio_s3_bucket_tags.my_bucket.tags["Environment"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tags` (Map of String)
